metadata.name: extended-algo-vector
metadata.summary: wrapper for vector algo that supports the extended-chart and strategy discovery

methods.name: extended_algo_vector.report.CalculatePnLStats.CalculatePnLStats.__init__
documentation:
Report api that converts trade data with "BUY" and "SELL" entries to pnl data with "LONG" and "SHORT" positions
Additional functionality allow for pnl position to be converted to chucked stats to allow for drift analysis
And allows for supplementing a continuous-timeseries features data for entry and exit optimization

```
param trade_data

For backward compatability, will be deprecated in feature release
```

\:param pnl_data with headers \[symbol, entry_time, exit_time, direction, entry_price, exit_price, quantity, commission, pnl_amount, pnl_with_commission\]
\:param features_data:
\:param restrict_feature_cols: reduce the features to a subset of columns
\:param stats_chunk: int=chunk by trade count, str=chunk by time-freq, (ALL | 0)=consolidated, None=skip,
\:param kwargs: leading_seconds and trailing_seconds adds a buffer to the features data

methods.name: extended_algo_vector.report.calculate.Pnl.CalculatePnL._run_mae_mfe_calc
documentation: pnl['pnl_amount'] = pnl.pnl_tick * pnl.symbol.apply(lambda x: self.symbol_lookup.get(x).multiplier) * pnl.quantity

methods.name: extended_algo_vector.engine.VectorStrategy.VectorStrategy.__init__
documentation:
---
param breakeven_stop_loss: Requires price to exceed breakeven trigger for stop loss
  to be adjusted to breakeven price
param breakeven_tigger(o): Adjust stop loss when price moves in favor and exceeds
  breakeven price
param chunk_stats: Generate stats in fixed chunks for decay analysis
param closeout_ttl: pd.offsets(..) generates closeout offsetting signal time; However
  time forces a hard closeout at time
param contract: References the ib_async contract
param end: Datetime of when to end strategy run
param feature_lookback_period: Provides leading features data for entry analysis
param feature_lookforward_period: Provides trailing features data for exit analysis
param override_strategy_name: Override the strategy name
param profit_target: Force profit target exit
param restrict_feature_cols: Restrict the columns that are tracked in the pnl data
param save_dir_root: Override default location where strategy metadata are saved
param start: Datetime of when to start strategy run
param stop_loss: Force stop loss exit
---

methods.name: extended_algo_vector.market.bars.Ticks.Ticks.__init__
documentation:
---
param agg_consecutive_last_px: sequential prices where last_px is the same will be
  rolled into one record with last_sz and tick_count summed to drastically shrink
  tick dataset for iteration
param use_cache: leveraging ticks is an expensive operation so best to leverage cache
  to reduce load time
---

classes.name: extended_algo_vector.market.MarketData.MarketData

methods.name: extended_algo_vector.market.MarketData.MarketData.__init__
documentation:
Get Historical Market data to feed strategy discovery:
: - TIME - 1S, 1Min, 30Min, 1W...
  - TICKS - aggregates consecutive last_px in transaction history
  - TICK_COUNT - tick count    using iqfeed tick data
  - TICK_VOLUME - volume traded    using iqfeed tick data
  - TICK_DOLLAR - volume * price traded using iqfeed tick data
  - SECONDS_VOLUME - volume traded   using iqfeed seconds data resampled at 5sec
  - SECONDS_DOLLAR - volume * close_p   using iqfeed seconds data resampled at 5sec

```
param contract

ib_async Contract object or iqfeed symbol in str

param start

start of market data feed

param end

end of market data feed

param market_data_type

references chart pattern to employ

param freq

reflects how the bar close

param use_cache

leverage existing market data cache if it exists, if not generate fresh cache on initial run

param agg_consecutive_last_px

reduce tick data by consolidating consecutive last px as one record

param lookback_period

market data will be supplied as inactive for datetime prior to start time.
```

(A closed offset-period should be used when resampling timeframe)
\:param lookforward_period: market data will be supplied as inactive for datetime exceeding end time
